summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of AR Diagnostic Interface. All features working perfectly including header with pulsing green dot, vehicle status bar, circular scan button with rotating rings, loading animation, diagnosis card with fault details, flashing warning banner, and reset functionality. Responsive design verified across desktop, tablet, and mobile viewports.
passed_tests: Header displays 'ARIA — X-Ray Vision Diagnostics | Metadome AI' with green pulsing dot and 'SYSTEM ACTIVE' label
Vehicle status bar shows 'Vehicle: Tata Nexon EV 2024 | Active Faults: 3 | Battery Temp: 47°C' with warning icon
Large circular scan button visible in center with proper styling and hover effects
Click scan button triggers loading animation showing 'ARIA Analyzing Component...'
Diagnosis card appears after 2 seconds with all required information: Fault Code P0A93, Component DC-DC Converter, Location, Severity CRITICAL, Safety Warning, and Repair Steps
Red warning banner appears at bottom flashing 'HIGH VOLTAGE ZONE DETECTED — Supervisor Notified'
Scan Another Component button successfully resets to initial scan state
AR overlay aesthetic with black background, neon cyan accents, grid background, and scanline effect working correctly
Futuristic fonts (Chakra Petch, JetBrains Mono) properly loaded and applied
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Responsive design works correctly on desktop (1920x1080), tablet (768x1024), and mobile (390x844)
Framer-motion animations are smooth and working correctly
No JavaScript errors detected during testing
Full scan flow works consistently on multiple test iterations
